description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Taxi service for concert at the Kai Tak Stadium (15 March 2026)
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德主場館演唱會的士服務(2026年3月15日)

2026-03-15T22:30:00.CONTENT_EN: It is the peak dispersal period of concert at the Kai Tak Stadium, the passenger queue for taxi service at the Kai Tak Stadium Taxi Pick-up/Drop-off Area is relatively long and it would take some time for boarding the taxis. Spectators are advised to use the MTR to leave the Kai Tak Sports Park. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2026-03-15T22:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時為啟德主場館演唱會散場人流高峰時段，啟德主場館的士上落客區現時輪候人數較多，輪候時間會較長。觀眾請選擇乘搭港鐵離開啟德體育園。 　　觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次

2026-03-16T17:59:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips:

•Arriving at Shenzhenbei on 24 Mar: G9532
•Departing from Shenzhenbei on 19, 20 Mar: G9531

Ticketing Methods:
•12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app
•Appointed travel agents
•Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
•Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay)
•Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time

Train schedules:
•12306 official website (12306. cn)  or mobile app.
2026-03-16T17:59:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次：

•3月24日前往深圳北：G9532
•3月19，20日由深圳北出發：G9531

購票方式：
•12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式
•指定代理
•前往香港西九龍站
•使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶）
•使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間

列車服務詳情：
•12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式。

2026-03-16T19:01:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips:
-From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station on 24 Mar: G9532
-From Shenzhenbei to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station on 19, 20 Mar: G9531

Ticketing Methods:
-12306 official website  (12306. cn) or mobile app
-Appointed travel agents 
-Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
-Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay)
-Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time

Train schedules:
-12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.
2026-03-16T19:01:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次：
-3月24日由香港西九龍站前往深圳北：G9532
-3月19，20日由深圳北前往香港西九龍站：G9531

購票方式：
-12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式
-指定代理
-前往香港西九龍站
-使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶）
-使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間

列車服務詳情：
-12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式。
